word: H4108 - מַהְלֵךְ - mahlêk - mah-lake' - Place to walk

sections.paragraph:
Original: מהלך

Transliteration: mahlêk

Phonetic: mah-lake'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Hiphil) walk, journey, going, place to walk
    1. walk
    2. journey
    3. goings, free access

Origin: from H1980

TWOT entry: 498d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
